title: WalletControl
description: A sovereign wallet control record. Defines ownership and governance of a permission, value, or capability wallet — not a live financial instrument.
$comment: This schema models sovereignty concepts only. It does not encode production wallet logic, cryptographic keys, or real transaction flows.

id.description: Unique identifier for this wallet control record.

owner.description: The sovereign identifier of the entity that owns and controls this wallet.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this wallet holds and its purpose.

accessControls.description: Who may read, modify, or delegate from this wallet.

readers.description: Identifiers of entities that may read wallet contents.

delegates.description: Identifiers of entities authorized to act on behalf of the wallet owner.

requiresMultiSig.description: Whether significant wallet operations require approval from multiple authorized parties.

multiSigThreshold.description: Minimum number of approvals required if requiresMultiSig is true.

contents.description: A list of items this wallet holds (permissions, credentials, capability grants, etc.).

itemId.description: Reference to the item (e.g., a permission ID, credential ID).

auditPolicy.description: Audit requirements for operations on this wallet.

logAllAccess.description: Whether all read and write access must be logged.

retentionPeriod.description: How long audit logs for this wallet must be retained. ISO 8601 duration.

recoveryPolicy.description: How the wallet owner may recover control if access is lost.
recoveryPolicy.$comment: Recovery secrets, private keys, and production recovery flows are explicitly excluded from this schema.

recoveryMethod.description: The type of recovery method configured.

recoveryContactCount.description: Number of trusted contacts (if method is trusted-contacts).

created.description: When this wallet control record was created.

updated.description: When this wallet control record was last updated.
